name: A Fancy Curry Powder
recipeIngredient: Cracked seeds - Cleaver to release seeds
1 cinnamon stick, thin and broken into pieces
Hot peppers - toasted and dried (to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small pan, combine fenugreek, cardamom, coriander, cumin, and mustard seeds, cloves, and broken cinnamon stick. Bake for 15 minutes, shaking the pan a few times. Let cool.
3. In a bowl, combine the toasted spices with mace, nutmeg, cayenne pepper, turmeric, and dried peppers. Place in a spice mill and grind to a powder. Store in an airtight container. Makes about half a cup of curry powder.
